output:
No. Taking the stairs would make penguin death **more** likely, not less.

In this world, the probability of penguin death when taking the elevator is 30%, while the probability when taking the stairs is 75%. So if you had taken the stairs instead, the probability of penguin death would increase from 30% to 75%. The counterfactual intervention (switching from elevator to stairs) would make penguin death more likely, not less.
